## The Problem

[2–3 sentences describing the specific workflow pain you identified in discovery. Reference the systems involved, the frequency of the manual work, and the impact on the team.]

---

## Scope

A focused, 3-day diagnostic of **[specific workflow name]** covering:

1. **Workflow Mapping** — Document the current end-to-end process across [System A], [System B], and [System C]
2. **Bottleneck Analysis** — Identify the exact points where manual effort, waiting, or rework occurs
3. **Trust Review** — Assess where stakeholders lose confidence in data accuracy or timeliness
4. **Implementation Recommendation** — Deliver a prioritized action plan with effort estimates

---

## Deliverables

| # | Deliverable | Format |
|---|-------------|--------|
| 1 | Current-state workflow map (annotated) | Miro / Lucidchart export |
| 2 | Bottleneck analysis with time-cost estimates | PDF report |
| 3 | Trust gap assessment | Included in report |
| 4 | Recommended implementation plan (prioritized) | PDF + editable doc |
| 5 | 30-minute walkthrough call | Live session |

---

## Timeline

| Day | Activity |
|-----|----------|
| Day 1 | Stakeholder interviews (2–3 people, 30 min each) + system access review |
| Day 2 | Workflow mapping + bottleneck identification + trust review |
| Day 3 | Report writing + recommendation development + walkthrough |
